## Type

- [ ] Feature / task (target branch: **`develop`**)

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `issueNumber-slug` (e.g. `1-login-api-integration`)
- [ ] Base branch is correct (`develop` for normal work; `main` for hotfix; `develop` for back-merge from `main`)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes locally
- [ ] For **hotfix**: follow-up **back-merge PR** (`main` → `develop`) is planned or linked
- [ ] For **release** (`develop` → `main`): merge only after validation and explicit approval
